title: Senior Revenue Manager at Club Mahindra

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Club Mahindra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Club Mahindra in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Club Mahindra:
Club Mahindra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Club Mahindra!
